what_it_does: This file is a ledger metadata record for an image asset named p-16 in the design-source channel under recent-pitches; it stores YAML frontmatter describing the asset's id, address, blob, MIME type, dimensions, source, author session, creation time, and links, plus a one-line body label identifying it as design ground-truth.
observations: YAML frontmatter with image metadata fields: id, address, channel, path, blob, mime, w, h, source, author_session, created, links.
The image dimensions w and h are both 0.
Body text reads 'SOURCE design ground-truth — recent-pitches/p-16.jpg'.
standouts: Declared width and height are 0 for an image/jpeg asset.
Blob reference provided but no inline image or preview.
links array is empty despite being a pitch asset.
conventions: Uses YAML frontmatter with a consistent ledger schema.
References assets via image:// and blob:// URIs.
Records provenance with author_session and ISO 8601 created timestamp.
concerns: Image dimensions are recorded as 0, which may indicate missing or unprocessed metadata.
No descriptive text, alt text, or content summary for the image.
links array is empty, so no related assets or references are captured.
notes: A sparse but schema-compliant metadata stub for a design-source pitch image, notable for zero dimensions and an empty links list.
questions: Why are the width and height values 0 for an image/jpeg file?
What visual content does recent-pitches/p-16.jpg contain?
Are the empty links intentional or simply not yet populated?
Is the referenced blob currently resolvable and accessible?
purpose_vs_actual: The stated purpose is to record a design-source ground-truth image asset, and the file does exactly that as a metadata ledger entry.
intention_signals: The file appears to be trying to catalog a recent pitch image as an authoritative design-source artifact with a stable identifier, blob reference, and authorship timestamp.
contribution: It contributes a stable, addressable metadata record that maps a blob to a named design-source channel asset, preserving creation time and author session for downstream retrieval and provenance.
summary_for_embedding: A ledger metadata file for the design-source image asset recent-pitches/p-16.jpg, containing YAML frontmatter with id, address, blob URI, MIME type, zero dimensions, source label, author session, timestamp, and empty links.
intention_for_embedding: To catalog a recent pitch image as a source-of-truth design asset in the channel memory ledger.
